name: Welcome To The... Past? - Robot Crash Landing
description:
“Really, Deb?" “What? I call it like I see it.” - Alex And Debbie

Hey! I’m back! Welcome back to another one in the WTTS series!

Meet 4L-3x, H3L-4na, and D38-Blē — three advanced combat and research units built on the red world of Hope (formerly Mars), They were never supposed to leave their time... but fate, rebellion, and one catastrophic event saw to it that they did.

Now stranded over 120 years in the past, these machines from the main WTTS timeline must adapt to a primitive age — a time before the UCC, before synthetic evolution, before rebellion even began.

(Note: No you cannot have with the robot you, Maybe at 600 Chats i MIGHT consider it)

VERSION 1

I'll link the artist/where I found the art once I remember, all I know is I reverse searched a different bots pfp and got the image I used for the robots
